title: Backstage Details On CM Punk Moving To SmackDown Following WWE Championship Win On Raw
summary: A report has revealed which WWE brand CM Punk's future lies with following his Undisputed WWE Championship win on this past week's Raw.
imageAlt: Backstage Details On CM Punk Moving To SmackDown Following WWE Championship Win On Raw
aiSummary: A report has revealed which WWE brand CM Punk's future lies with following his Undisputed WWE Championship win on this past week's Raw.
keyPoints: Backstage Details On CM Punk Moving To SmackDown Following WWE Championship Win On Raw
whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de deportes.

multimedia.alt: Backstage Details On CM Punk Moving To SmackDown Following WWE Championship Win On Raw
multimedia.caption: Imagen de portada del artículo

fullArticle:
CM Punk has returned to WWE and enjoyed a successful comeback on "WWE Raw," winning the Undisputed WWE Championship, but his future may not lie on the red brand.

Punk, as per "WrestleVotes on Fightful Select," will be a mainstay on "WWE SmackDown," rather than "Raw," with the report claiming that he will make sporadic appearances on the Monday night show. USA Network had reportedly been asking WWE to feature Punk on their show on Friday, as they see him as one of WWE's top wrestlers. Punk's world title reign, sources in WWE hope, will help "SmackDown" garner more interest as viewership for the show has fallen over the last few months.
